title: Sweet Crisp Turkish Napa Cabbage Braise
description: A sweet and crunchy Turkish-inspired dish featuring napa cabbage, perfect for a brunch gathering. This plant-based friendly recipe is easy to make and packed with flavor.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add shredded napa cabbage and cook until it starts to wilt, about 5 minutes.
Stir in Turkish sweet pepper paste, lemon juice, and pomegranate molasses.
Season with salt, black pepper, and sumac (if using).
Reduce heat to low and braise, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the cabbage is tender and slightly caramelized.
Serve hot, garnished with additional sumac (if desired).
Pair with crusty bread or over rice for a satisfying brunch dish.
